title: Settings
subtitle: Your profile, how the app reaches you, and account security.

profile.title: Profile
profile.shareBody: neighbors will see your number in the Neighbors section

language.title: App language
language.body: The language is set for your account only. The committee can use the app in Czech while you use English or German — over the same building data.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.body: Choose how the app reaches you. We recommend leaving push on — it makes sure you never miss an announcement from the building.
notifications.demoNote: In the demo, messages are collected in an in-app outbox so you can see the reminder schedule. In production they go out by email, SMS, and push.

reminders.title: Automatic payment reminders
reminders.body: The app sends these on the committee's behalf — no one has to track due dates manually.

demo.title: Demo mode.
demo.body: You're viewing a public demo with made-up data — nothing is saved.
demo.exitLink: Exit the demo and log in

toastPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
